scripts.bundle:check: mkdir -p /tmp/ai-agent/kmux-plugin-check && bun build kmux-status-server.ts --target bun --external @opencode-ai/plugin --external @opencode-ai/sdk --outfile /tmp/ai-agent/kmux-plugin-check/kmux-status-server-check.js && bun build kmux-opencode-launcher.ts --target bun --outfile /tmp/ai-agent/kmux-plugin-check/kmux-opencode-launcher-check.js
scripts.check: bun run fmt:check && bun run test && bun run typecheck && bun run bundle:check
